'''鈭歯-zh-f''' ('''kanazhaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zeroize|zeroize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-zh-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zeroize|zeroize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯-zh-f
|-
! Lemma
| kanazhaf
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinazhaf|thinazhaf]] || [[word:jinazhaf|jinazhaf]] || [[word:shinazhaf|shinazhaf]] || [[word:kinazhaf|kinazhaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunazhaf|thuthunazhaf]] || [[word:jujunazhaf|jujunazhaf]] || [[word:shushunazhaf|shushunazhaf]] || [[word:kukunazhaf|kukunazhaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunazhaf|thunazhaf]] || [[word:junazhaf|junazhaf]] || [[word:shunazhaf|shunazhaf]] || [[word:kunazhaf|kunazhaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunazhaf|thunazhaf]] || [[word:junazhaf|junazhaf]] || [[word:shunazhaf|shunazhaf]] || [[word:kunazhaf|kunazhaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenazhaf|thenazhaf]] || [[word:jenazhaf|jenazhaf]] || [[word:shenazhaf|shenazhaf]] || [[word:kenazhaf|kenazhaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonazhaf|thothonazhaf]] || [[word:jojonazhaf|jojonazhaf]] || [[word:shoshonazhaf|shoshonazhaf]] || [[word:kokonazhaf|kokonazhaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonazhaf|thonazhaf]] || [[word:jonazhaf|jonazhaf]] || [[word:shonazhaf|shonazhaf]] || [[word:konazhaf|konazhaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonazhaf|thonazhaf]] || [[word:jonazhaf|jonazhaf]] || [[word:shonazhaf|shonazhaf]] || [[word:konazhaf|konazhaf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:nazhaf|nazhaf]] || [[word:nazhaf|nazhaf]] || [[word:nazhaf|nazhaf]] || [[word:nazhaf|nazhaf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:nazhaf|nazhaf]] || [[word:nazhaf|nazhaf]] || [[word:nazhaf|nazhaf]] || [[word:nazhaf|nazhaf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:nazhaf|nazhaf]] || [[word:nazhaf|nazhaf]] || [[word:nazhaf|nazhaf]] || [[word:nazhaf|nazhaf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:nazhaf|nazhaf]] || [[word:nazhaf|nazhaf]] || [[word:nazhaf|nazhaf]] || [[word:nazhaf|nazhaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙nazhaf|th忙nazhaf]] || [[word:j忙nazhaf|j忙nazhaf]] || [[word:sh忙nazhaf|sh忙nazhaf]] || [[word:k忙nazhaf|k忙nazhaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanazhaf|thathanazhaf]] || [[word:jajanazhaf|jajanazhaf]] || [[word:shashanazhaf|shashanazhaf]] || [[word:kakanazhaf|kakanazhaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanazhaf|thanazhaf]] || [[word:janazhaf|janazhaf]] || [[word:shanazhaf|shanazhaf]] || [[word:kanazhaf|kanazhaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanazhaf|thanazhaf]] || [[word:janazhaf|janazhaf]] || [[word:shanazhaf|shanazhaf]] || [[word:kanazhaf|kanazhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shanazhaf|shanazhaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshanazhaf|goshanazhaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishanazhaf|gokishanazhaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shanazhafn眉|shanazhafn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshanazhafnkn眉|goshanazhafnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishanazhafn眉|gokishanazhafn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanazhafsh毛|shanazhafsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanazhafnksh毛|goshanazhafnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanazhafsh毛|gokishanazhafsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanazhafro|shanazhafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanazhafnkro|goshanazhafnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanazhafro|gokishanazhafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shanazhafmu|shanazhafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanazhafnkmu|goshanazhafnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanazhafmu|gokishanazhafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shanazhafsher|shanazhafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshanazhafnksher|goshanazhafnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishanazhafsher|gokishanazhafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shanazhafng|shanazhafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshanazhafnkng|goshanazhafnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishanazhafng|gokishanazhafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shanazhafya|shanazhafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshanazhafnkya|goshanazhafnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishanazhafya|gokishanazhafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shanazhafyam|shanazhafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshanazhafnkyam|goshanazhafnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishanazhafyam|gokishanazhafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanazhafn眉sh毛|shanazhafn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanazhafnkn眉sh毛|goshanazhafnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanazhafn眉sh毛|gokishanazhafn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanazhafn眉ro|shanazhafn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanazhafnkn眉ro|goshanazhafnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanazhafn眉ro|gokishanazhafn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanazhafn眉mu|shanazhafn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanazhafnkn眉mu|goshanazhafnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanazhafn眉mu|gokishanazhafn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanazhafsh毛n眉|shanazhafsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanazhafnksh毛n眉|goshanazhafnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanazhafsh毛n眉|gokishanazhafsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanazhafsh毛ro|shanazhafsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanazhafnksh毛ro|goshanazhafnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanazhafsh毛ro|gokishanazhafsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanazhafsh毛mu|shanazhafsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanazhafnksh毛mu|goshanazhafnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanazhafsh毛mu|gokishanazhafsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanazhafron眉|shanazhafron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanazhafnkron眉|goshanazhafnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanazhafron眉|gokishanazhafron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanazhafrosh毛|shanazhafrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanazhafnkrosh毛|goshanazhafnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanazhafrosh毛|gokishanazhafrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanazhafromu|shanazhafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanazhafnkromu|goshanazhafnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanazhafromu|gokishanazhafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanazhafmun眉|shanazhafmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanazhafnkmun眉|goshanazhafnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanazhafmun眉|gokishanazhafmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanazhafmush毛|shanazhafmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanazhafnkmush毛|goshanazhafnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanazhafmush毛|gokishanazhafmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanazhafmuro|shanazhafmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanazhafnkmuro|goshanazhafnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanazhafmuro|gokishanazhafmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
